<?php namespace Laravel\Breeze; use Illuminate\Contracts\Support\DeferrableProvider; use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider; class BreezeServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider implements DeferrableProvider { /** * Register any application services. * * @return void */ public function register() { // } /** * Bootstrap any application services. * * @return void */ public function boot() { if (! $this->app->runningInConsole()) { return; } $this->commands([ Console\InstallCommand::class, ]); } /** * Get the services provided by the provider. * * @return array */ public function provides() { return [Console\InstallCommand::class]; } }
